ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough where the park is located */,
  "size_acres" REAL /* Size of the park in acres */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the park */,
  "park_address" TEXT /* Address of the park */,
  "park_description" TEXT /* Description of the park */,
  "park_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the park record was created */,
  "park_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the park record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parks_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parks_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park associated with the crime statistics */,
  "crime_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime occurred */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., murder, robbery) */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "murder_count" INTEGER /* Number of murder incidents reported */,
  "rape_count" INTEGER /* Number of rape incidents reported */,
  "robbery_count" INTEGER /* Number of robbery incidents reported */,
  "felony_assault_count" INTEGER /* Number of felony assault incidents reported */,
  "burglary_count" INTEGER /* Number of burglary incidents reported */,
  "grand_larceny_count" INTEGER /* Number of grand larceny incidents reported */,
  "grand_larceny_motor_vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of grand larceny of motor vehicle incidents reported */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes reported in the park */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "borough_description" TEXT /* Description of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, park manager, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., NYPD, Parks Department) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user when accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "crime_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "crime_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "crime_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category */,
  "crime_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics_bridge" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime record */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "crime_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_bridge_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_bridge_crime_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("crime_category_id")
)
